items.name: SFSH-77 "Oophaga" Tactical Stealth Helmet
items.description: Commissioned by the "Social Alignment Bureau". This helmet was originally designed for Internal Affairs within Grunkles military sectors, however during testing the capabilities of the helmet far exceeded its initial role and as such it was later adopted (Or informally by the Internal Military Police- "stolen") By various Corporate Special Forces elements for Stealth Operations. Most notably, Lynx Company.

items.name: Cute Cozy Black McBling Fur Winter Belt
items.description: Stay warm and stylish with the Cute Cozy Black McBling Fur Winter Belt! This belt brings together plush, soft black faux fur with a glamorous McBling vibe, making it an essential for the colder months. Perfect for adding a cozy yet chic touch to any outfit, it cinches at the waist to create a flattering silhouette, whether layered over coats, sweaters, or dresses. With its luxurious feel and retro-inspired style, this belt is the ultimate winter accessory for those who love a mix of comfort and sparkle!

items.name: Olive OV-2A Helmet (w/o Visor)
items.description:
Since the Mk-22s addition to the BDO arsenal, development of affordable power armor have been in production oversight by the company's Overseer. Adopted after the final trials, this armor has a built in miniature reactor core capable of long lasting power while operating. The suit itself is vacuum sealed to offer protection while operating in space, but also protects against dangerous gasses.

items.name: Celestial Commander Coat [PBR]
items.description:
✨⚔️ Armor of Light, Worn with Honor ⚔️✨
Step into the role of a divine leader with the Celestial Commander Coat. Crafted in radiant white with golden accents, this majestic outfit combines the authority of a commander with the purity of a holy knight. Flowing panels and intricate details make it a perfect choice for roleplay, fantasy battles, or anyone who seeks to shine with honor.
💡 Why You’ll Love It
Detailed PBR textures for a realistic, noble finish
Gold-trimmed design adds luxury and divine flair
Long ceremonial coat for commanding presence
Perfect for roleplay as paladins, generals, or angelic warriors
🔍 Keywords: holy knight, celestial coat, commander outfit, fantasy roleplay, divine armor, white robe, gold trim, Roblox clothing, PBR outfit
⚡ Rule the battlefield with the strength of justice and the glow of divinity.
This model includes high-quality PBR textures.
